disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Jaw is clamped shut, painful, and cannot open enough to eat solid food; came on and worsened over about two days
trigger_question_examples: Can you open your mouth at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My jaw is clamped shut and it aches. I can barely open it — I haven't been able to eat anything solid for two days.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: For about 48 hours, a constant feeling that something bad is about to happen, with a pounding heart and inability to settle
trigger_question_examples: How have you been feeling in yourself?
Can you tell me about the dread you mentioned?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For two days straight I've had this feeling something terrible is coming. My heart pounds and I can't calm down no matter what I do.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has not slept for about two days, repeatedly waking in a panic
trigger_question_examples: Have you managed to rest at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't really slept in two days. Every time I start to drift off I jolt awake in a panic.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Whole body shaking with muscle tension in the jaw, neck and pelvic area, and an exaggerated startle to small sounds
trigger_question_examples: Are you noticing anything in the rest of your body?
How does your body feel right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My whole body is shaking and tight — my neck, my jaw, even lower down. I jump out of my skin at the smallest noise.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels numb or detached, especially when dealing with officials or authority figures; has felt on-guard for a long time; a recent dealing with an official process triggered this episode
trigger_question_examples: Did anything happen just before this started?
Is there anything going on that's been weighing on you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: A run-in with an official process set it off. Honestly I've felt on-guard for years, and when I have to deal with people in authority I go numb and kind of check out.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't really want to get into all that — can we just deal with my jaw?

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Took over-the-counter paracetamol with no relief; on no regular prescription medications
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for it?
Are you on any regular medications?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took some paracetamol but it did nothing for the jaw. I'm not on any regular medications.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: On sensitive direct questioning, currently denies thoughts of self-harm but reports feeling exhausted and overwhelmed
trigger_question_examples: With everything you're carrying, have you had any thoughts of harming yourself or that life isn't worth living?
Have you felt like you couldn't go on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't want to hurt myself — I'm just completely exhausted and scared. I want this to stop.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No recent cuts or wounds, tetanus vaccination reported up to date, no fever, and can still swallow saliva although it is uncomfortable
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any recent cuts, wounds or injuries?
Do you have a fever, and can you still swallow your saliva okay?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No cuts or injuries recently, and my tetanus shots are up to date. I don't have a fever, and I can still swallow my spit — it's just uncomfortable.
